CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Continued To Dec-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-28-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell L. Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. Counsel informs the Court that the case has settled. The case is scheduled for a 3.1385 Dismissal Order To Show Cause on AUG-28-2018 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
